exitCriteria: Oms central order state machine wired across all modes (live, paper, backtest). position_id assigned at submit time. OrderState transitions explicit. Cache.oms_orders authoritative.

stories.name: Create engine/oms.rs — OrderState, OmsOrder, Oms
stories.description: Create libs/nexus/src/engine/oms.rs with OrderState enum, OmsOrder struct, Oms struct with Arc<Cache>, Arc<MsgBus>, PositionIdGenerator, OmsType. Methods: submit_order, apply_accepted, apply_fill, apply_fill_no_publish, cancel, apply_rejection.
acceptanceCriteria: OrderState enum has variants: Pending, Accepted, PartiallyFilled, Filled, Cancelled, Rejected

OmsOrder struct has all required fields: client_order_id, venue_order_id: Option<VenueOrderId>, position_id, state: OrderState, filled_qty, last_fill_price, submitted_at_ns, strategy_id, instrument_id, order_side
Oms struct holds cache: Arc<Cache>, msgbus: Arc<MsgBus>, position_id_gen: PositionIdGenerator, oms_type: OmsType
Oms::new(cache, msgbus, oms_type) compiles and constructs Oms with all fields
Oms::submit_order() calls position_id_gen.next_with_oms() and returns PositionId
Oms::apply_accepted(), apply_fill(), apply_fill_no_publish(), cancel(), apply_rejection() all compile with correct signatures
cargo build -p nexus compiles engine/oms.rs with zero warnings

stories.name: Add Cache::oms_orders map + indices + update_oms_order
stories.description: Add oms_orders HashMap, new index fields (open/closed/strategy/instrument), update_oms_order() with full index maintenance, get_oms_order(). Modify get_order() to return None for OMS orders during transition.
acceptanceCriteria: Cache struct has oms_orders: HashMap<ClientOrderId, OmsOrder>
Cache struct has index_oms_orders_open: HashSet<ClientOrderId>
Cache struct has index_oms_orders_closed: HashSet<ClientOrderId>
Cache struct has index_oms_orders_strategy: HashMap<StrategyId, HashSet<ClientOrderId>>
Cache struct has index_oms_orders_instrument: HashMap<InstrumentId, HashSet<ClientOrderId>>
Cache::update_oms_order(order: OmsOrder) inserts into oms_orders AND updates all indices
Cache::get_oms_order(client_order_id) -> Option<&OmsOrder> added
Cache::get_order() returns None when oms_orders contains the order (transition signal)
cargo build -p nexus compiles with zero warnings

stories.name: Wire Oms into ExecutionClient (live path)
stories.description: ExecutionClient owns an Oms instance. submit_order(): oms.submit_order() -> HTTP place_order -> returns (VenueOrderId, PositionId). apply_accepted() called from handle_execution_report() on WS NEW event. Fill/cancel/reject flow through Oms.
acceptanceCriteria: ExecutionClient struct has oms: Oms field
ExecutionClient::new() constructs Oms::new(cache.clone(), Arc::new(msgbus), oms_type)
ExecutionClient::submit_order(&mut self, submit: SubmitOrder) -> Result<(VenueOrderId, PositionId), BinanceApiError>
submit_order calls oms.submit_order() then http.place_order() then returns (venue_order_id, position_id)
handle_execution_report() calls oms.apply_accepted() on NEW status
handle_execution_report() calls oms.apply_fill() on PARTIALLY_FILLED/FILLED status
handle_execution_report() calls oms.cancel() on CANCELED/EXPIRED status
handle_execution_report() calls oms.apply_rejection() on REJECTED status
pending_orders HashMap removed from ExecutionClient
cargo build -p nexus compiles with zero warnings

stories.name: Wire Oms into PaperBroker (paper path)
stories.description: PaperBroker replaces client_position_map and client_order_map with Oms instance. process_order() calls oms.submit_order() then oms.apply_fill_no_publish(). cancel_order() calls oms.cancel(). No double-publishing since fills are returned directly.
acceptanceCriteria: PaperBroker struct replaces client_position_map/client_order_map with oms: Oms
PaperBroker::new() constructs Oms::new(cache.clone(), Arc::new(msgbus), oms_type)
process_order() calls oms.submit_order() for position_id
process_order() calls oms.apply_fill_no_publish() for fills (not apply_fill to avoid double-publish)
cancel_order() calls oms.cancel()
client_position_map and client_order_map fields removed
cargo build -p nexus compiles with zero warnings

stories.name: Wire Oms into BacktestEngine (backtest path)
stories.description: BacktestEngine owns an Oms instance with strategy_id. Constructor takes oms_type, strategy_id, cache, msgbus as new params. Order submissions go through Oms::submit_order() in run() loop. Limit fills go through Oms::apply_fill() in process_fills(). Market fills go through Oms::apply_fill() in open_position(). check_pending_orders and check_sl_tp extracted as standalone functions.
acceptanceCriteria: BacktestEngine::new() takes oms_type: OmsType, strategy_id: StrategyId, cache: Arc<Cache>, msgbus: Arc<MsgBus> as new params
BacktestEngine struct has oms: Oms and strategy_id: StrategyId fields
BacktestEngine constructs Oms::new(cache, Arc::new(msgbus), oms_type)
order_manager: OrderManager field removed from BacktestEngine struct
run() loop calls self.oms.submit_order() when order is submitted
process_fills() calls self.oms.apply_fill() before open_position()
open_position() calls self.oms.apply_fill() for market order fills
check_pending_orders() and check_sl_tp() extracted as standalone functions in orders.rs
cargo test -p nexus --lib passes with migrated tests

stories.name: Update engine/mod.rs exports + retire OrderManager
stories.description: Export Oms, OmsOrder, OrderState from engine/mod.rs. Remove OrderManager struct from BacktestEngine. Order type with SL/TP stays in orders.rs.
acceptanceCriteria: engine/mod.rs has 'pub mod oms' and 'pub use oms::{Oms, OmsOrder, OrderState}'
engine/orders.rs not deleted — Order type with SL/TP fields stays
OrderManager struct removed from BacktestEngine
cargo build -p nexus compiles with zero warnings

stories.name: Zero warnings, all tests pass
stories.description: Final verification: build clean, all tests pass, clippy clean.
acceptanceCriteria: cargo build -p nexus produces zero warnings
cargo test -p nexus --lib passes all tests
cargo clippy -p nexus --deny warnings passes
New OMS unit tests in engine/oms.rs pass

architecture.oms_location: engine/oms.rs — shared by backtest, live, and paper
architecture.cache_state: oms_orders becomes authoritative; orders map deprecated during transition
architecture.position_id: generated at submit_order time via PositionIdGenerator.next_with_oms()
architecture.msgbus_wiring: Oms stores Arc<MsgBus>, self-publishes without requiring mutable caller reference
architecture.backtest_fill_paths: limit orders: process_fills() -> Oms::apply_fill(); market orders: open_position() -> Oms::apply_fill()
architecture.paper_no_double_publish: PaperBroker uses apply_fill_no_publish() since fills are returned directly

known_limitations: get_order() returns None for OMS orders during transition — should add #[deprecated] note in Phase 5.4
Backtest path has no VenueOrderId mechanism (not meaningful for backtest)
deferred: Phase 5.4: Remove legacy orders map, migrate all get_order() callers to get_oms_order()
